description: "Performance optimization guidelines"

<!-- Based on/Inspired by: https://github.com/github/awesome-copilot/blob/main/instructions/performance.instructions.md -->

# Performance Guidelines

- Measure before optimizing: add benchmarks or profiling to identify bottlenecks.
- Prefer efficient algorithms and avoid premature optimization of non-critical paths.
- Use caching and memoization for repeated work, but keep cache invalidation simple.
- Monitor real-world performance via lightweight metrics in production.
